all.title: Product Marketing - AI Partnership Launch Poster Scene
all.description:
This prompt generates a polished promotional poster showing two AI mascots announcing a creative-tech collaboration in a lively studio press event, ideal for launch campaigns and social media marketing. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A warm, editorial-style announcement poster set inside a sunlit creative studio with a cozy startup office vibe. Center the composition on two cute mascots sitting side by side on a beige couch, surrounded by photographers, journalists, and content creators documenting the moment. Above them, place a large hand-painted poster on a light brick wall reading “Big news. Better together. {argument name="brand name" default="Skywork"} × {argument name="product name" default="GPT Image 2"}” in oversized brush lettering, with playful colorful accent strokes around the text. The left mascot is a glossy blue chibi character with a round body, big black oval eyes, a smiling face, white face panel, a paintbrush-shaped crest on its head, a painter’s palette motif on its cheek, and a white “S” on its belly, gesturing happily with one hand. The right mascot is a small white-and-teal robot with a rounded helmet-like head, black face screen, glowing cyan eyes and smile, teal circuitry details across the body, and a teal spiral emblem on the chest, also smiling and gesturing as if in conversation. Put a wooden coffee table in front of them with exactly 8 visible items: 1 small potted plant, 1 white mug reading “PIXELS IDEAS IMPACT,” 3 stacked design books, 1 open sketchbook with concept drawings, 1 pen, 1 smartphone lying flat, and 1 smartphone held in the foreground capturing the mascots. Surround the scene with exactly 7 visible human figures partially entering frame, some holding DSLR cameras, one holding a video camera with a flip-out screen, and 3 microphones with cube flags labeled “TECH NEWS,” “AI ZONE,” and another media mic. Add translucent cyan holographic interface panels floating beside the robot, suggesting AI-generated visuals and design tools. Decorate the walls and shelves with creative studio details: pinned art prints and posters reading “Create Inspire Elevate,” “CREATIVITY MEETS INTELLIGENCE,” “IMAGINE GENERATE ELEVATE,” and “FUTURE IS CREATIVE,” plus a paintbrush illustration, a circuit diagram print, books, plants, and a studio light in the upper right corner. Lighting is golden-hour sunlight streaming through large industrial windows on both sides, creating a cinematic, optimistic launch-event mood. Style: polished 3D illustration mixed with commercial lifestyle photography, highly detailed, friendly, brand-forward, vibrant but tasteful colors, soft depth of field, premium poster composition, square format. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

Style: polished 3D illustration mixed with commercial lifestyle photography, highly detailed, friendly, brand-forward, vibrant but tasteful colors, soft depth of field, premium poster composition, square format.

This prompt recreates a classic game cover from a reference image as a modern 4K semi-realistic promotional artwork while preserving the original layout and character lineup. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Using the provided reference image, recreate the same retro game-cover composition as a polished 4K cinematic remake. Keep the large "ROLO TO THE RESCUE" title at the top, the horizontal framed key art layout, the jungle setting, and the lineup of 5 characters in the same left-to-right order: beaver in the water, squirrel on the bank, elephant in the center, blue rabbit, and mole emerging from a dirt mound with a miner helmet. Transform all 5 characters into cute semi-realistic 3D animated creatures with natural fur, skin, and soft stylization, while preserving their recognizable proportions and the nostalgic feel of the original cover. Clean up the composition so it looks like premium modern game promotional art, with warm golden-hour jungle lighting, richer depth, more realistic vegetation and water reflections, and a refined wooden frame. all.title: Product Marketing - Style Spectrum Fashion Poster
all.description:
A luxury vertical editorial poster showing seven styled personas of the same woman, ideal for fashion branding, personal style concepts, or social media campaign visuals. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A high-end fashion editorial poster in a vertical 9:16 format, set inside a serene futuristic circular gallery with smooth beige stone walls, a large round skylight in the ceiling, soft diffused warm lighting, and a sculptural circular platform at the center. The image shows 7 versions of the same young East Asian woman with long dark wavy hair, each styled as a different personality archetype, arranged around the circular platform in an elegant symmetrical composition. The central and largest figure sits on the edge of the platform facing forward, wearing a loose ivory-white button-front blouse and matching relaxed trousers, calm and introspective, becoming the visual anchor. Around her are 6 alternate style personas: 1 woman on the left in a soft cream dress with hair in a bun, gentle and approachable; 1 woman at the back center standing in a sleeveless black tailored outfit, cool and rational; 1 woman on the upper right seated in a light beige cardigan and pale skirt or trousers, casual and relaxed; 1 woman on the lower left in a sharp black blazer and dark outfit, urban minimalist; 1 woman on the lower right in a taupe oversized suit, mature and confident; 1 woman at the bottom front crouching in a cozy cream knit and loose light pants, everyday comfort style. All seven figures have the same identity but different styling, mood, and pose. Use a muted neutral palette of ivory, cream, taupe, beige, stone gray, and black, with soft atmospheric haze, cinematic depth, luxury magazine aesthetics, minimalism, and polished skin. Add elegant Chinese typography integrated into the composition: top headline {argument name="headline text" default="你不只有一种样子"} with smaller English subtitle {argument name="subtitle text" default="Explore your style spectrum"}. Place 6 Chinese style labels with short descriptive taglines near the surrounding personas: 温柔氛围, 清冷知性, 松弛韩系, 都市极简, 轻熟气场, 日常休闲. At the bottom add the Chinese call-to-action {argument name="bottom question" default="你最想成为哪一个？"} and smaller line {argument name="bottom caption" default="评论区告诉我"}. all.title: Product Marketing - AI Model Router App Store Screenshot
all.description:
A premium mobile app marketing screenshot showing a branded AI model-routing interface with provider logos, promotional copy, and a cute mascot, ideal for App Store listings or startup launch visuals. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Create a polished App Store promotional screenshot in a warm beige and golden-orange brand palette, portrait orientation, with a premium friendly startup aesthetic. The layout is a single vertically composed marketing graphic with a soft cream background and an orange gradient floor at the bottom. On the left upper side, place a very large elegant black serif headline split across 3 lines reading {argument name="headline text" default="Powered by leading AI models"}. To the right of the headline, add a small white jagged starburst badge with a subtle drop shadow containing 2 lines of serif text: {argument name="badge text" default="Best models"}. Beneath the headline on the left, show a vertical list of exactly 4 AI providers with icon plus name, evenly spaced: Claude with an orange sunburst icon, Gemini with a multicolor four-point sparkle icon, OpenAI with a black knot logo, and Seedance with a purple-blue gradient S icon. Below that, add a left-aligned serif body copy block with 2 parts: first a black text list on 4 lines reading "Claude, Gemini, OpenAI, Seedance.", then a final brand-colored orange line reading {argument name="tagline text" default="Empowered by Merl."}. On the right half, place a large realistic modern smartphone angled slightly left, with a reflective silver frame, black screen border, dynamic-island style top cutout, visible side button, and soft shadow. The phone screen should show a clean cream-colored app UI for an AI model-routing app. At the very top of the phone display, include the status time 9:41 and standard signal, wifi, and battery icons. Inside the app, show a tiny greeting line "HEY BESTIE.", then a bold serif question title {argument name="screen title" default="What are we casting?"}, followed by a short sans-serif subtitle about routing the request to the best AI model for the job. Add a small rounded badge in the upper right of the app content reading "+ 8 credits". Below that, include a section label "The model stack" and a stack of exactly 4 rounded cards, each in a lightly tinted pastel background. Card 1: Claude, with orange sunburst icon, description "writing, reasoning, voice-matched outputs", and a small pill label "BEST FOR WRITING". Card 2: Gemini, with multicolor sparkle icon, description "image generation, research, visual tasks", and pill label "BEST FOR IMAGES". Card 3: OpenAI, with black knot icon, description "headshots, image generation, smart creation", and pill label "BEST FOR CREATION". Card 4: Seedance, with purple-blue gradient S icon, description "video generation, motion, AI UGC clips", and pill label "BEST FOR VIDEO". Under the cards, place a large rounded yellow-orange CTA button reading "Start Casting ✦", with a small line below saying "8 credits per session". At the bottom of the phone UI, create a black tab bar with exactly 4 navigation items: home icon, a selected center pill with a small mascot face and the label {argument name="app name" default="Merl"}, a clock/history icon, and a profile icon. In front of the lower left of the phone, place a cute 3D mascot character: a rounded cream-colored blob with tiny feet, dark brown dot eyes, rosy cheeks, and a smiling mouth, wearing a golden wizard hat and matching cape tied with a round clasp. The mascot should overlap the phone slightly and sit on the orange floor, casting a soft shadow. Overall style: luxury-friendly tech branding, crisp typography, subtle realism, soft shadows, clean app mockup, App Store screenshot quality, consistent visual branding, highly legible, high resolution. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

all.title: E-commerce Main Image - Reference-to-Boho Fashion Ad Remake
all.description:
This prompt recreates a lifestyle ecommerce fashion poster by applying the layout and visual style of one reference image to a different clothing product image with fresh marketing copy. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Using REFERENCE_0 as the layout, scene, and ad-style template, and REFERENCE_1 as the product source, recreate the same 2-panel fashion marketing collage but replace the original dress with the blouse from REFERENCE_1. Keep the beach-and-poolside lifestyle composition from REFERENCE_0: 1 large upper-left close crop, 1 full-body standing shot in the upper-right beach scene, 1 seated poolside shot in the lower-left, and 3 circular fabric/detail callouts stacked vertically on the right. Preserve the overall premium boho summer campaign look, soft natural sunlight, sandy beach, parasol, deck chair, basket accessories, and resort mood. Restyle the product into realistic lifestyle wear: the same red embroidered V-neck blouse from REFERENCE_1 paired with short denim bottoms in the full-body and seated views, while keeping the woman and styling visually consistent across all panels. Replace all headline and feature copy from the reference with new English fashion-ad text, not copied wording: use a large title {argument name="headline text" default="Holiday"} with a smaller script brand word above it, a short 3-line descriptive subtitle, and 3 feature blurbs matching the circular callouts. The 3 feature headings should emphasize neckline, sleeve length, and embroidery details. Keep the polished ecommerce poster design, rounded white card edges, elegant typography hierarchy, and a handwritten pink tagline at the lower right {argument name="tagline" default="Boho Chic Style"}. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

all.title: E-commerce Main Image - Luxury Skincare Editorial Grid
all.description:
A 12-panel cinematic beauty collage for premium skincare branding, ideal for cosmetic ads, campaign moodboards, and luxury product marketing. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Create a luxury skincare campaign collage in a 4 by 3 editorial grid with exactly 12 tiles, using a warm ivory, cream, champagne, and soft beige palette. The overall mood is ultra-refined, minimal, sensual, and high-end, with milky diffused lighting, soft cinematic shadows, glossy hydrated skin, and a premium beauty magazine aesthetic. Tile 1: a frosted glass skincare pump bottle standing on a clear shelf, matte cream body, metallic gold pump and collar, elegant serif branding reading {argument name="brand name" default="BLOOMGLOW"}, product name reading {argument name="product name" default="RADIANCE MOISTURIZING EMULSION"}, photographed against a creamy beige wall with diagonal sunlight. Tile 2: a macro swipe of thick white lotion on a smooth cream surface, sculptural texture, soft highlights. Tile 3: a close crop of a woman's head and neck from behind, dark hair in a clean low bun, luminous skin, ear visible, minimal composition. Tile 4: sheer cream curtains lit by sunlight with the shadow silhouette of leaves or flowers cast across them. Tile 5: close-up of a woman's bare shoulder and upper back, dewy glowing skin, one hand touching the shoulder, a thin streak of lotion trailing down the back, intimate skincare editorial framing. Tile 6: a glossy translucent droplet of emulsion resting on a creamy matte surface, macro product texture study. Tile 7: a close crop of the lower face, jawline, neck, and collarbone of the same woman, fingers gently touching the neck, fresh hydrated glow, soft shadow. Tile 8: another macro smear of white cream, smoother and broader than tile 2, with reflective wet highlights. Tile 9: sunlit rippling water in pale champagne tones, abstract liquid texture with sparkling reflections. Tile 10: the same skincare bottle lying diagonally on softly wrinkled satin or silk fabric, gentle sunlight, subtle shadow, branding visible. Tile 11: close-up of hands applying a white oval dollop of lotion onto the back of one hand with the fingertips of the other hand, elegant manicured natural nails. Tile 12: glossy neckline and shoulders of the woman, collarbones highlighted, luminous moisturized skin, dark hair partially visible at the top edge. Keep the composition clean and balanced with thin white dividers between all 12 panels. Style keywords: minimalist luxury, creamy soft light, premium cosmetic advertisement, tactile textures, hydration, skin radiance, cinematic beauty editorial, understated opulence, breathable moisture glow. No clutter, no bright colors, no props beyond bottle, fabric, water, curtains, and skincare textures. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

all.title: E-commerce Main Image - Japanese Rainwear Catalog Layout
all.description:
This prompt generates a polished Japanese editorial product sheet for a blue raincoat and matching hat, ideal for fashion catalog, brand lookbook, or e-commerce campaign visuals. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Create a clean, high-end Japanese fashion catalog page on a soft warm light-gray background, featuring a coordinated rainwear set laid flat as a product editorial. The central focus is 1 women's hooded raincoat in a muted dusty blue tone, shown front-facing and neatly arranged with sleeves slightly bent inward. The coat is mid-thigh length with a full front zipper, snap-button storm placket details near the collar, a large structured hood, adjustable drawcords at both the hood and waist, two vertical zip pockets, subtle seam construction, and a slightly longer curved back hem with a darker inner lining visible at the bottom opening. Above and to the right, place 1 matching wide-brim rain hat in the same dusty blue, angled slightly, with a darker contrasting brim underside and a small black tag on the crown. Use soft diffused studio lighting with gentle realistic shadows to give a premium product-photography look. Add editorial typography and callouts around the products in a minimalist Japanese layout. In the upper left, place a small Japanese tagline reading "雨の日も、わたしらしく。" above a large serif English headline reading "OUTDOOR SET UP". Beneath it, add a short vertical block of Japanese body copy describing the stylish functional raincoat-and-hat set. In the lower left, add a serif subheading "DETAILS" with 2 circular inset detail photos stacked vertically: the top circle shows a close-up of the hood and front fastening area with drawcord hardware; the bottom circle shows water droplets beading on the blue waterproof fabric. To the right of each circle, place short Japanese explanatory text. On the right side of the page, add 2 product callout labels in serif English with thin leader lines: "HAT" near the upper-right hat with a short Japanese description below, and "COAT" near the lower-right side of the coat with a short Japanese description below. Keep the layout airy and balanced, with elegant negative space, refined magazine styling, realistic garment textures, and a modern outdoor-luxury aesthetic. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1
#### 📌 Details - **Author:** [aichof(アイチョフ)](https://x.com/aichof21) - **Source:** [Twitter Post](https://x.com/aichof21/status/2049045982357454871#reversed-1) - **Published:** April 28, 2026 - **Languages:** en **[👉 Try it now →](https://youmind.com/gpt-image-2-prompts?id=16892)** ---

all.title: E-commerce Main Image - Pet Apparel Replacement Mockup
all.description:
This generates a clean EC-style comparison mockup showing a dog sweater reference and a final product photo of a cat wearing the same outfit, useful for pet clothing listings and promotional visuals. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Create a clean e-commerce mockup on a very light gray background with a simple two-image comparison layout. all.description:
A sophisticated prompt for creating high-end product advertising photos featuring a model and detailed product packaging with modern typography and studio lighting. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A polished, high-end product photography scene showcases a confident young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="smooth dark hair"}, dressed in a soft pink textured top, standing against a minimalist grey studio backdrop. In the foreground, a sleek {argument name="product name" default="Ellie Beauty spray bottle"} takes center focus, sharply detailed with a reflective metallic label that shifts between green and gold tones. The composition is brought to life with dynamic lime-green motion streaks and floating rounded tags that call out key benefits such as “high-shine finish” and “heat defense up to 450°F” in bold, modern sans-serif typography. Soft, diffused studio lighting enhances the model’s natural features while producing crisp reflections along the bottle’s surface. In the upper corner, a striking lime-green headline poses the question, “{argument name="headline" default="What does it do?"}”, tying the layout together with a fresh, contemporary advertising feel and a shallow depth of field that keeps both the product and the model’s expression clear and compelling. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

all.title: E-commerce Main Image - Protein Powder Splash Hero Shot
all.description:
This prompt generates a dramatic premium supplement product advertisement with a floating whey tub, chocolate splash, and flying cookies for ecommerce or fitness brand web assets. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Create a hyper-realistic commercial product splash shot of a large white plastic whey protein tub labeled {argument name="brand name" default="PUREZZA"} and {argument name="product name" default="WHEYPRO"}, floating slightly above a glass filled with thick chocolate protein shake. The tub is centered, angled slightly to the right, with a clean glossy surface and a bold blue, white, and black label design. The label should prominently read “100% WPC PROTEIN MILK” and include small nutrition callouts such as “82G PROTEIN,” “2G SUGAR/SERVING,” “119% RDI OF VC,” “100% CHOLINE,” a circular “GMP” badge, a black strip reading “WHEY MILK PROTEIN CONCENTRATE,” another strip reading “LOW SUGAR / LOW FAT / RICH NATURAL,” and a flavor tag reading {argument name="flavor text" default="BLACK COOKIES FLAVOUR"}. Surround the tub with an explosive upward and outward splash of glossy chocolate liquid, with dramatic arcs, droplets, and suspended motion frozen in midair. Include exactly 5 whole chocolate sandwich cookies flying around the product and multiple broken cookie chunks and crumbs scattered throughout the scene, with one partially visible cookie near the lower right and another near the upper left. The glass at the bottom should be only partially visible, transparent, and overflowing from the impact of the splash. Use a high-contrast studio background with a dark deep blue gradient on the left fading to bright white on the right, cinematic rim lighting, crisp reflections, ultra-sharp focus on the tub, and detailed texture in the liquid and cookie crumbs. The overall look should be premium sports nutrition advertising, dynamic, energetic, and suitable for a hero image on a modern ecommerce fitness website. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1
#### 📌 Details - **Author:** [🏛️Aleksandros🏛️](https://x.com/CaudilloGalaico) - **Source:** [Twitter Post](https://x.com/CaudilloGalaico/status/2048741931962819045#reversed-0) - **Published:** April 27, 2026 - **Languages:** en **[👉 Try it now →](https://youmind.com/gpt-image-2-prompts?id=16728)** ---

all.title: E-commerce Main Image - Fashion Editorial Outfit Breakdown
all.description:
This prompt turns a reference outfit photo into a polished magazine-style apparel layout for product presentation and catalog mockups. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Using REFERENCE_0, extract only the outfit and turn it into a clean fashion magazine product showcase on a light warm-beige background. Remove the person entirely and display the clothing as separate laid-flat items: 1 cropped short-sleeve top centered near the top and 1 pair of shorts centered below it. Preserve the vivid multicolor art print from the reference, but present the garments neatly, as if for an editorial catalog page, with soft studio shadows. Add 1 circular fabric-detail inset at the lower left showing a close-up of the print. Add elegant editorial typography and thin callout lines, with 4 text blocks total: a large headline block at upper left reading “COLORFUL ART SET UP” with small Japanese copy above and below, 1 right-side block labeled “TOPS” with Japanese description, 1 lower-right block labeled “BOTTOMS” with Japanese description, and 1 lower-left block labeled “FABRIC” with short Japanese description. Keep the overall look refined, minimal, premium, and like a clothing introduction page in a magazine. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

This prompt generates a soft pastel anime illustration of an elf girl typing at her computer in a cozy kawaii workspace, ideal for social posts, wallpapers, or streamer-themed art. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A cute pastel anime illustration of a young elf girl streamer or office worker sitting at a desk and typing on a mechanical keyboard in a cozy bedroom workspace, shown from a front three-quarter view with a large black computer monitor in the left foreground partially blocking her body. She has long wavy {argument name="hair color" default="orange"} hair with glossy highlights, pointed elf ears, and a small red flower hair clip on the right side, wearing a light blue pajama-style blouse covered in red heart prints with a very frilly white lace collar and a shiny red ribbon bow at the neck. Her hands are on the keyboard, nails painted soft pink, and she sits in a rounded pink desk chair. Above her head is a speech bubble containing a large question mark, suggesting confusion while working at the computer. The room is soft, bright, and feminine, with a pale pink and cream color palette, shallow depth of field, and delicate line art. In the background, include 1 framed wall picture with a pink animal and heart motif, 1 small potted plant near the center-left, 1 plush toy on a shelf behind her, 2 sticky notes on the upper right wall, one with a plus sign and one reading {argument name="note text" default="がんばろう!"}, 1 blue cat figurine or plush on the right shelf, 1 small potted plant on the right, 4 pastel binders or books on the lower right shelf, and 1 white mug with a pink heart on the desk in the lower right corner. The computer monitor should have a subtle glowing blue heart icon on its back, and the keyboard should have RGB lighting. raycast.title: Social Media Post - Travel Snapshot Collage Prompt
raycast.description:
A detailed prompt for creating a nostalgic, 12-frame collage of smartphone-style travel photos depicting a solo journey. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A 12-frame collage of candid, emotional snapshots of a young {argument name="ethnicity" default="Chinese"} woman traveling alone in {argument name="location" default="Phuket Island"}, casually captured on a {argument name="device" default="smartphone"}. Each frame feels like a fleeting personal memory — imperfect, sun-drenched, intimate, and unposed. The woman has a naturally curvy figure with a soft, feminine silhouette, subtly emphasizing her bust without exaggeration. Her presence feels real and unstyled, like a private photo album. Scenes include: walking barefoot on the beach, seaside under the strong sunlight, palm trees swaying, overexposed ocean reflections, small local cafés, a modest motel room, sunset the coast, night markets, views from inside a moving car. Shot with a smartphone aesthetic: slight motion blur, soft focus, blown-out highlights from tropical sunlight, lens flare, sun glare, high ISO noise at night, uneven framing, accidental cropping. Composition feels random and spontaneous — subject sometimes off-center, partially cut off, mid-motion, or obscured by light leaks. Lighting varies: harsh midday sun, warm golden hour glow, deep sunset tones, humid night street lighting. Color grading: faded cinematic tones, slightly desaturated with warm highlights, nostalgic film-like look, subtle grain, lifted blacks. Emotion: solitude, fleeting youth, bittersweet nostalgia, quiet introspection, like memories from a trip taken alone. Layout: 12 images arranged in a loose, imperfect collage grid, slightly tilted and misaligned like a scrapbook. No text, no watermark. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

raycast.title: Social Media Post - Anime Pokémon Shop Outfit Teaser Poster
raycast.description:
This prompt generates a soft pastel anime fashion announcement poster featuring a blurred-face girl in a blue dress inside a Pokémon store, ideal for outfit reveal teasers and character promo visuals. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A dreamy pastel anime fashion announcement poster set inside a bright Pokémon merchandise shop. The composition is vertical and split visually into two zones: a large translucent information panel on the left and a full-body character showcase on the right. The scene has a soft, elegant, airy atmosphere with diffused indoor lighting, creamy highlights, gentle reflections on the polished floor, and a refined shoujo illustration style. In the background, show a clearly recognizable Pokémon store interior with display shelves, the Pokémon logo sign, a large Poké Ball emblem on the wall, potted plants, plush toys, and figures; visible Pokémon merchandise includes exactly 3 prominent character plushies or mascots: Pikachu at the bottom right, plus 2 small shelf plushies resembling Piplup and another pastel blue-green character. The girl stands slightly right of center in a graceful fashion pose with one leg crossing in front of the other, one hand lightly raised near her chest, and the other relaxed outward. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur block. She has long wavy {argument name="hair color" default="platinum blonde"} hair with loose curls and a delicate feminine look. She wears a refined pastel outfit: a frilled white high-neck blouse with layered ruffles, a light blue sleeveless pinafore-style dress with a fitted waist and a flowing mid-calf flared skirt, a small white crossbody purse with a flap, white ankle socks, and glossy black Mary Jane shoes. Add subtle pink earrings. The outfit should feel classy, fresh, and cute, with gentle fabric movement. On the left, place a frosted semi-transparent poster panel with elegant typography and decorative flourishes. Include exactly 5 text blocks or labeled areas on this panel: 1) a top banner with Japanese text "次回衣装プロンプト公開" above large cursive English text {argument name="headline text" default="Next Outfit"}; 2) a name block with Japanese text "セラス・柳田・リリエンフェルト" and smaller romanized text "Ceras Yanagida Lilienfeld"; 3) a teaser line reading "次回の衣装も お楽しみに！" with a small Poké Ball icon; 4) a bordered description box titled "Next Coordinate" followed by several lines of small Japanese body text; 5) a bottom ribbon reading {argument name="footer text" default="Coming Soon..."} and "STAY TUNED!" with a small Pikachu silhouette. Use pale blue, white, silver-gray, and blush pastel tones throughout. Add faint ornamental corner decorations and a polished promotional layout, like a boutique fashion teaser poster for a themed anime character outfit reveal. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

raycast.title: Infographic / Edu Visual - Detailed Animal Encyclopedia Generation
raycast.description:
A sophisticated prompt for creating high-quality animal encyclopedia pages with anatomical details, habitat information, and evolutionary stages. #### 📝 Prompt ``` [Animal Name] {argument name="animal name" default="insert animal name here"} [Objective] Complete a large-format animal encyclopedia plate at a sellable quality level as a single illustration. Generate a publishing-quality plate that balances scientific accuracy with visual appeal. [Output Format] - Include all information in one image - Aspect Ratio: 16:9 - Quality: High (essential for ensuring precision of small text, fine lines, and labels) [Screen Design Principles] Layout, zoning, information priority, margin design, typography, decorative elements, and color palette should all be determined autonomously by GPT based on the animal's characteristics, habitat, and classification. Design a layout best suited for this specific animal without being bound by templates. [Essential Elements to Include] Integrate the following elements naturally into one frame: 1. Main Specimen Drawing - Full body of adult depicted with maximum precision - Scientifically accurate colors, patterns, and proportions - Scientific name (italicized), common name, and classification info (Order, Family, Genus) - Scale bar or size comparison 2. Growth/Development Record - Step-by-step illustration of changes from juvenile to adult - Concise labels for each stage 3. Ecological/Behavioral Depiction - Action scenes in natural environments (foraging, predation, breeding, territoriality, etc.) - Include habitat vegetation and terrain in the background 4. Morphological Details - Close-ups of characteristic parts (claws, fangs, feathers, scales, eyes, etc.) - Magnified depictions of surface textures 5. Distribution/Habitat Range - World or regional distribution map - Description of habitat types 6. Data Notations - Length, weight, lifespan, diet, conservation status (IUCN, etc.) - Easy-to-read table or icon format [Style Specification] - Publisher-quality natural history encyclopedia - Realistic botanical/naturalist painting touch (19th-century naturalist precision + modern color expression) - Paper texture: Cream-colored hot-press watercolor paper or parchment style - Font: Unified serif. Scientific names in italics; data can use mixed small sans-serif fonts - Border: Thin ink border + classical plate decoration - Overall color scheme, layout tone, and page design optimized by GPT based on habitat, classification, and ecology [Most Important Instruction] Deeply understand the unique ecology, cultural significance, and taxonomic features of this animal to design a page that feels like it was "made just for this animal." Visualize the essence of the animal rather than using a generic template. Ensure all text is actually rendered within the frame, leaving no empty labels. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1
##### Image 2
##### Image 3
##### Image 4
#### 📌 Details - **Author:** [あかくま屋](https://x.com/aokuma0219) - **Source:** [Twitter Post](https://x.com/aokuma0219/status/2049273535043129624) - **Published:** April 28, 2026 - **Languages:** ja **[👉 Try it now →](https://youmind.com/gpt-image-2-prompts?id=16845)** ---
raycast.prompt:
[Animal Name]
{argument name="animal name" default="insert animal name here"}

[Objective]
Complete a large-format animal encyclopedia plate at a sellable quality level as a single illustration. Generate a publishing-quality plate that balances scientific accuracy with visual appeal.

[Output Format]
- Include all information in one image
- Aspect Ratio: 16:9
- Quality: High (essential for ensuring precision of small text, fine lines, and labels)

[Screen Design Principles]
Layout, zoning, information priority, margin design, typography, decorative elements, and color palette should all be determined autonomously by GPT based on the animal's characteristics, habitat, and classification. Design a layout best suited for this specific animal without being bound by templates.

[Essential Elements to Include]
Integrate the following elements naturally into one frame:

1. Main Specimen Drawing
- Full body of adult depicted with maximum precision
- Scientifically accurate colors, patterns, and proportions
- Scientific name (italicized), common name, and classification info (Order, Family, Genus)
- Scale bar or size comparison

2. Growth/Development Record
- Step-by-step illustration of changes from juvenile to adult
- Concise labels for each stage

3. Ecological/Behavioral Depiction
- Action scenes in natural environments (foraging, predation, breeding, territoriality, etc.)
- Include habitat vegetation and terrain in the background

4. Morphological Details
- Close-ups of characteristic parts (claws, fangs, feathers, scales, eyes, etc.)
- Magnified depictions of surface textures

5. Distribution/Habitat Range
- World or regional distribution map
- Description of habitat types

6. Data Notations
- Length, weight, lifespan, diet, conservation status (IUCN, etc.)
- Easy-to-read table or icon format

[Style Specification]
- Publisher-quality natural history encyclopedia
- Realistic botanical/naturalist painting touch (19th-century naturalist precision + modern color expression)
- Paper texture: Cream-colored hot-press watercolor paper or parchment style
- Font: Unified serif. Scientific names in italics; data can use mixed small sans-serif fonts
- Border: Thin ink border + classical plate decoration
- Overall color scheme, layout tone, and page design optimized by GPT based on habitat, classification, and ecology

[Most Important Instruction]
Deeply understand the unique ecology, cultural significance, and taxonomic features of this animal to design a page that feels like it was "made just for this animal." Visualize the essence of the animal rather than using a generic template. Ensure all text is actually rendered within the frame, leaving no empty labels.

Add these 8 report sections: 1) top header with small English text "FACIAL BEAUTY REPORT ✦", the large Japanese title, and the subtitle "あなたらしさを活かし、より魅力的になるための分析レポート"; 2) an OVERVIEW box listing exactly 5 rows: 年齢（推定） 20–24歳, 性別 女性, 顔の形 やや卵型, パーソナル印象 清潔感・親しみやすい・柔らかい, 分析日 2024.05.24; 3) a total score box labeled 総合魅力度スコア with a circular gauge showing {argument name="total score" default="82"}/100 and a small score guide reading 50=平均的 / 70=良い / 85=非常に良い / 90+=優秀; 4) a metrics box with exactly 7 bullet scores: 左右対称性 84/100, 顔の比率（プロポーション） 83/100, 骨格・輪郭 80/100, 肌質 85/100, 目の魅力 85/100, 鼻のバランス 78/100, 口元の魅力 81/100, 全体の調和 83/100; 5) a FACIAL CONTOUR（シンプルライン図） panel showing a simplified line-art face diagram with the blurred face area masked and measurement guides labeled exactly 1/3, 1/3, 1/3 vertically and 1/5 repeated 5 times along the bottom; 6) a 詳細分析 section with exactly 8 rows matching the metrics above and short explanatory Japanese comments; 7) a strengths box titled 強み（あなたの魅力ポイント） with exactly 3 icon-led items: クリアで印象的な目元, なめらかな肌質, バランスの取れた輪郭; 8) an improvements box titled 改善できる点（より魅力を高めるために） with exactly 3 icon-led items: 目の下のクマ, 鼻の立体感, 唇の血色感; 9) a final recommendation row titled 身だしなみ・スタイル改善提案 with exactly 4 columns labeled ヘアスタイル, メイク, スキンケア, ライフスタイル, each with a simple black line icon and short Japanese advice. Add a small footer line on the bottom right reading {argument name="footer text" default="BEAUTY IS BALANCE."}. Overall style: minimalist clinic report, balanced grid layout, soft shadows, rounded panels, black and gray only, highly legible Japanese magazine design.

raycast.title: Infographic / Edu Visual - Choreography Instruction Sheet Generator
raycast.description:
A technical prompt for creating professional dance sequence guides in a 4x4 grid layout, maintaining character consistency from a reference image. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Dance Sequence Instruction Sheet [VISUAL STYLE] {argument name="visual style" default="Monochrome grayscale composition"} featuring a highly detailed 3D-rendered {argument name="subject" default="female dancer"}. Designed like a professional choreography guide with a technical, diagram-inspired layout. Clean white background, soft studio lighting, and strong contrast to highlight body movement and posture. [GRID LAYOUT] Structured 4×4 panel grid (16 frames total), evenly spaced with thin black divider lines. Each panel is identical in size and clearly numbered from 1 to 16 to show a continuous dance progression. [CHARACTER] Use image1 as the base character. The same {argument name="subject" default="female dancer"} appears consistently across all panels with accurate likeness and proportions. [WARDROBE] The dancer wears a stylish, performance-ready outfit: {argument name="outfit" default="a well-fitted top paired with a short, flowy skirt"}. The look should feel modern and visually appealing while still practical for dance movement. Fabric should subtly respond to motion (slight flow and folds), even in grayscale. [PANEL STRUCTURE – EACH FRAME] Top-left: Step number + short dance move title (e.g., “Step 5 – Spin Transition”) Center: Full-body pose capturing a precise moment in the choreography Bottom-left: 3–4 lines of concise instruction describing the move Overlay: Motion arrows and directional guides illustrating how the dancer transitions [MOTION INDICATORS] Incorporate curved arrows for fluid motion, straight arrows for directional steps, and circular indicators for spins or turns. Emphasize rhythm, weight shifts, and body isolation. [RENDER QUALITY] High-detail sculpted 3D style with smooth grayscale shading, subtle shadows, and clean linework. Maintain a polished, concept-art level finish with clarity in every pose. [RESTRICTIONS] No color, no background scenery, no extra characters, no visual clutter—only the dancer and instructional elements. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

raycast.title: Infographic / Edu Visual - Dark AI Product Keynote Slide
raycast.description:
This prompt generates a sleek black presentation slide for an AI product deck, ideal for keynote visuals, startup storytelling, and polished PPT covers. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A premium dark presentation slide in a minimalist editorial tech style, widescreen 16:9 layout, matte black background with refined off-white typography and subtle gray divider lines. The overall mood is sleek, cinematic, and high-end, like a product keynote or design-forward AI startup deck. In the top left, place 2 small navigation lines of text: "UI SCENE · OPEN HARNESS" and below it "DEEP AGENTS" in thin uppercase sans serif with generous tracking. In the top right, add a small page indicator reading "07 / 08". The main headline dominates the upper left in large elegant serif Chinese and English mixed typography: {argument name="headline text" default="开放 harness,开放记忆。"}. Below it, add a 2-line Chinese body paragraph in smaller serif text: {argument name="body text" default="解决方案不是让模型供应商替你保管状态,而是把 harness、标准和记忆后端都放回开发者手里。"}. In the left-middle area, create 3 horizontal feature rows separated by thin gray lines, each row using a bold Chinese label on the left, a short Chinese description in the center, and a tiny uppercase English keyword aligned right. Row 1 label: "标准", description: "agents.md / skills 让上下文入口可见。", keyword: "OPEN". Row 2 label: "模型", description: "模型可替换,记忆不应被单一平台绑定。", keyword: "AGNOSTIC". Row 3 label: "存储", description: "Mongo / Postgres / Redis 可作为自有记忆后端。", keyword: "OWNED". On the right side, place a large embedded UI mockup inside a soft light-gray rounded rectangular frame with a subtle shadow, resembling a product dashboard screenshot. The mockup should be monochrome light beige and gray, highly structured, and divided into 3 main columns. Left column: a narrow vertical icon sidebar plus a project/file panel listing items such as "agents.md", "skills", "workflows", "memories", "tools", and a code editor block at the bottom. Center column: a section titled "模型无关" with 4 selectable model rows and small controls, plus 3 feature cards along the bottom. Right column: a section titled "记忆后端" with 3 database cards for MongoDB, Postgres, and Redis, and a lower panel titled "可迁移" showing a code snippet. Include another top card in the mockup titled "开放标准" with tab-like controls. At the bottom left outside the mockup, add a tiny caption line in Chinese and English reading "UI 情景图 · 三张同高画面板测试". At the bottom center, include a carousel indicator made of 8 small dots with the 7th highlighted as a short white pill and the others as dim gray circles. At the bottom right, place a small page number "07". Also add a faint tiny footer note near the lower right edge in Chinese and English, very subtle, such as a presentation metadata line. Use precise grid alignment, lots of negative space, understated luxury, Swiss-style composition, and a polished AI-product keynote aesthetic. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1
#### 📌 Details - **Author:** [歸藏(guizang.ai)](https://x.com/op7418) - **Source:** [Twitter Post](https://x.com/op7418/status/2049094944405737512#reversed-3) - **Published:** April 28, 2026 - **Languages:** en **[👉 Try it now →](https://youmind.com/gpt-image-2-prompts?id=16948)** ---

raycast.title: Infographic / Edu Visual - Cinematic Memory Loss PPT Slide
raycast.description:
This prompt generates a premium black-background editorial presentation slide combining Chinese storytelling typography with a documentary-style office photo, ideal for keynote or PPT narrative pages. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Create a minimalist cinematic presentation slide on a deep black background in a premium editorial PPT style, widescreen 16:9. The layout is asymmetrical, with a large text block on the left and one documentary-style photo on the upper right, leaving generous negative space. This prompt generates a polished vertical anime film poster with a central silver-haired girl, layered travel scenery, Spanish promotional text, and theatrical award-style graphics for cinematic concept art or mock movie campaigns. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A cinematic anime movie poster for a fictional film titled {argument name="headline text" default="EL VIAJE DE LA LUNA DE PLATA"}, in polished modern Japanese animation style with a natural, less over-detailed look. Center a teenage anime girl from mid-thigh up, facing forward, with a short silver bob haircut, pale skin, a black choker, small black geometric earrings, a white tank top, and a dark navy oversized zip hoodie with two yellow stripes running down the sleeves. She has a backpack strap over one shoulder and both hands tucked casually into the hoodie pockets. Her face is obscured by a flat rectangular censor block in a muted beige tone, covering the entire face area. Place her in a dramatic twilight coastal city setting that blends travel, nostalgia, and fantasy: on the left, a lit train platform with a commuter train approaching, its destination sign showing Japanese characters; behind it, a glowing city skyline with a ferris wheel. In the distance and lower left, layered mountains and a winding illuminated valley road. On the right, a cliffside coast at sunset with the sea reflecting warm light, a crescent moon in the sky, several flying seabirds, and a curving highway descending along the hillside. Also on the right, include a wooden signpost with exactly 3 directional signs labeled "NUEVOS CAMINOS", "VIEJOS RECUERDOS", and "SIN LÍMITES". At the top center, add the Spanish tagline {argument name="tagline text" default="CADA DESTINO CAMBIA SU HISTORIA"} in elegant serif capitals. On the upper left, create an awards column in gold typography with laurel wreaths and exactly 4 award blocks: one text block reading "GANADORA DE MÚLTIPLES PREMIOS" with 5 gold stars beneath it, then three laurel award sections reading "MEJOR PELÍCULA ANIMADA / FESTIVAL INTERNACIONAL DE ANIMACIÓN / 2024", "PREMIO DEL PÚBLICO / FESTIVAL INTERNACIONAL DE CINE / 2024", and "MEJOR BANDA SONORA ORIGINAL / ACADEMIA DE CINE ANIMADO / 2024". Place the film title large across the lower center in luminous ornate serif lettering with a magical glow and sweeping flourishes, layered partly over the character. Beneath it, add the Spanish quote {argument name="quote" default="A veces, para encontrarte... tienes que perderte en el mundo."}. Below that, add "UNA PELÍCULA DE ESTUDIO LUMINARIA" in small caps. At the bottom, add the release line {argument name="release text" default="PRÓXIMAMENTE EN CINES"} in large gold serif capitals, plus tiny production logos and credits along the footer, including a small studio emblem on the left. Rich blue, violet, and warm sunset orange palette, glossy poster lighting, romantic adventure mood, balanced composition, highly polished theatrical key art, vertical one-sheet film poster. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

raycast.title: Comic / Storyboard - Burning Anime School Thriller Poster
raycast.description:
A high-impact anime-style movie poster featuring rival students, a burning campus, and a motorcycle chase, ideal for blockbuster film key art or promotional concept posters. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A dramatic Japanese anime movie poster in a dark action-thriller style, vertically composed like a theatrical one-sheet. The background is a school campus and city street engulfed in flames at night, with blazing orange fire, black smoke, flying embers, shattered structures, rain-slick pavement, and a cinematic apocalyptic atmosphere. In the top half, show 2 large opposing character close-ups in profile facing inward: on the left, a teenage boy with tousled medium brown hair, pale skin, and a serious expression, wearing a dark school uniform jacket and white shirt; on the right, a teenage girl with long dark hair tied back, pale skin, and an intense expression, also in a school uniform with a red ribbon at the collar. Between them, place a reflective knife blade angled upward, catching the firelight. Add a vertical Japanese tagline in the upper center, white serif text, reading {argument name="tagline text" default="この夏、隠された絆が運命を変える―"}. Across the middle, place a huge layered title in Japanese with distressed metallic texture, heavy cinematic typography, motion slashes, sparks, and red-to-blue contrast, reading {argument name="main title" default="私立 あかつき学園"}, with a smaller Japanese subtitle above it reading "絆とスパイと夏". Directly below, add the English subtitle in bold silver blockbuster lettering: {argument name="english subtitle" default="THE SUMMER WITH SHADOW BONDS"}. In the bottom half, show 1 full-body action scene of a determined teenage schoolgirl riding a blue sport motorcycle at high speed through the burning campus street. She has short brown hair whipping in the wind, a fierce focused stare, a short-sleeved white school shirt, loosened red tie, plaid skirt, fingerless black gloves, and black shoes. Her pose is low and aggressive over the handlebars, as if in pursuit or escape. The motorcycle is sleek and angular with bright headlights and visible decals including "Shinobi" on the fairing and "250R" on the exhaust. Include 1 pursuing police car with flashing red and blue lights in the right background. At the very bottom, add small Japanese film-credit style text lines and a release line in gold and white reading {argument name="release line" default="2025.夏 ROADSHOW"}. Use ultra-detailed anime illustration, high contrast lighting, glossy reflections, dramatic rim light, intense orange-and-blue color grading, dynamic perspective, premium modern anime poster design, and the polished look of a high-budget theatrical key visual. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

raycast.title: Comic / Storyboard - Anime Sky Fantasy Key Visual
raycast.description:
A wide anime-style fantasy poster featuring a silver-haired heroine, a white dragon, floating sky islands, and Japanese title text, ideal for a light novel or anime episode cover image. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A polished anime fantasy key visual in a wide cinematic composition, showing a serene young heroine on the right half of the frame against a vast sky kingdom. She is a beautiful teenage girl with {argument name="hair color" default="long silver-white"} hair, large {argument name="eye color" default="clear blue"} eyes, pale skin, and a calm, slightly wistful smile as she turns her head back toward the viewer over her shoulder. Her hair is very long and windblown, with soft layered bangs and a side ornament: 1 blue crystal hairpiece with silver filigree and trailing blue ribbons. She wears an elegant white-and-blue fantasy outfit with 4 visible main garment elements: 1 white hooded cape draped over her shoulders, 1 deep blue inner dress or tunic, 1 ornate silver armored shoulder and upper sleeve section with engraved details, and 1 blue gemstone brooch set at the chest. The background is a luminous high-altitude fantasy world filled with bright clouds, blue sky, and floating islands; include 3 prominent floating architectural elements: 1 large central floating landmass with castle structures, 1 tall narrow spire emerging from the lower left clouds, and 1 distant towered island near the center. In the upper left sky, depict 1 majestic white dragon with wings spread, flying diagonally above the title area. Add a large stylized Japanese title on the left side with metallic silver and glowing blue typography, reading {argument name="main title" default="白竜の翼と青き記憶"}, with decorative wing motifs integrated into the lettering. Beneath it, add 2 smaller lines of subtitle text in Japanese, centered left: {argument name="episode label" default="第１話"} and {argument name="episode subtitle" default="白銀の空隙"}. Scatter a few white glowing feathers or petals in the air. Use a cool palette of white, silver, and luminous azure, highly detailed linework, soft cel shading, crisp highlights, ethereal lighting, and the feel of a premium light novel cover or fantasy anime promotional poster. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

The overall style is a high-end silhouette-filled narrative synthesis with double-exposure associations, but leaning more towards a fusion of movie posters and dreamlike watercolor illustration styles. Soft atmospheric perspective, light fogging transitions, paper grain, edge white space and brush marks, large areas of negative space, restrained and high-end layout, quiet, grand, sacred, nostalgic, poetic, and legendary. raycast.title: Comic / Storyboard - Pink-Haired Cathedral Knight
raycast.description:
This prompt generates a dramatic full-body anime knight heroine in ornate armor inside a glowing stained-glass cathedral, ideal for fantasy character art and high-detail AI illustration showcases. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A full-body anime fantasy heroine in a grand stained-glass cathedral, viewed from a dramatic low angle. She is a beautiful young knight-princess with very long, flowing twin-tail hair in {argument name="hair color" default="pastel pink"}, the hair streaming outward in luminous ribbons as if caught by magical wind. Her face is intentionally obscured by a simple rectangular blur block. She wears ornate white and deep royal blue ceremonial armor with lavish gold filigree, a fitted breastplate, layered shoulder armor, long armored sleeves, a short blue skirt with gold trim, white thigh-high stockings with lace tops, and intricate gold knee and shin guards. A large crimson cape with a pale inner lining billows around her. One hand rests near her chest while the other hangs gracefully at her side. At her hip is an elegant sword with a glowing blue blade and a highly decorated gold-and-jewel hilt. The setting is flooded with radiant sunlight pouring through towering multicolored stained-glass windows and gothic arches, filling the scene with sparkling highlights, prism-like reflections, floating glitter, and magical particles. Use an ultra-detailed, highly polished anime illustration style with rich gemlike colors, intense backlighting, glossy surfaces, shimmering metal, dynamic cloth motion, and a majestic holy-fantasy atmosphere. Emphasize cinematic composition, heroic presence, and breathtaking luminous detail. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

raycast.title: Comic / Storyboard - Cinematic Storyboard: The Mountain Troll
raycast.description:
A detailed colored storyboard prompt describing a troll's journey through mountains and his discovery of a flower. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Storyboard — colored. The {argument name="character" default="troll"} is walking alone in the {argument name="setting" default="mountains, through snow and wind"}. He gets back home to his cave, all exhausted. The troll spots a tiny flower in a beam of light on a ridge outside the cave. Add a shot where focus is on the flower, then focus shifts to the troll and he says "what is this?" in a deep troll voice. He goes in really close and sniffs. He smiles and picks up the little flower, including the dirt around it. Ensure shots are cinematic and have great composition. We don't need the troll in every shot. Include text and instructions. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

raycast.title: Comic / Storyboard - Rainy Night Floral Gothic Portrait
raycast.description:
This prompt generates a dramatic anime-style full-body portrait of an elegant girl in a rain-soaked flower-filled interior, ideal for moody character art and atmospheric fantasy illustrations. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A moody, cinematic anime-style scene of a young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="silver"} chin-length bob hair, sitting in a dim flower-filled room at night during heavy rain. She is draped languidly across a wooden table and a stacked old wooden chest, with one arm hanging down loosely and her posture conveying exhaustion, melancholy, or dreamy stillness. She wears a pale {argument name="dress color" default="light sage green"} off-shoulder Victorian-inspired dress with ruffled sleeves, a fitted bodice, a full ankle-length skirt, white trim, a short white apron-like bustle at the back, and 2 large dark teal ribbon bows, one at the waist and one near the back. She wears black Mary Jane heels. The setting is an indoor conservatory or flower shop with a full wall of tall windowpanes behind her; rain droplets cover the glass, and blurred city lights glow outside in the night. Add 2 strong starburst light flares through the window on the right side, plus scattered reflections on the wet floor. The room contains abundant floral arrangements and loose flowers, with dark red, pink, and cream blossoms placed in shadowy clusters around the left, right, and foreground edges. The floor is glossy and wet, covered with scattered rose petals and puddle-like reflections. The table and chest are damp and glistening, enhancing the rain-soaked atmosphere. Composition is full-body, slightly angled from the front-left, with the character centered-right in frame. Lighting is low-key and dramatic, with bright backlight from the window, soft rim light on the dress and hair, deep shadows, and sparkling highlights on raindrops, petals, and wet surfaces. Highly detailed, realistic fabric folds, reflective water, romantic gothic ambience, elegant but slightly cluttered scene, ultra-detailed digital illustration. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

raycast.title: Comic / Storyboard - Fantasy GPT Image Skills Banner
raycast.description:
A wide fantasy workshop banner showing chibi apprentices presenting different AI-generated image styles around a master, ideal for social headers or promotional art about creative image-generation skills. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A richly detailed fantasy workshop illustration in a wide cinematic banner format, crowded with playful young apprentice characters gathered around an elderly master in the center. The scene has a magical artisan studio atmosphere with warm amber lighting, glowing runes, floating icons, scrolls, framed artworks, and shelves full of tools and curios. raycast.title: Comic / Storyboard - Retro Pop-Art Comic Strip
raycast.description:
A 4-panel comic strip prompt in a 1980s retro pop-art style featuring a mint-green haired woman and a chibi penguin. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A 4-panel comic strip in bold retro Sunday funnies / 1980s pop-art style, thick black outlines, halftone textures, vibrant saturated colors (hot pink, cyan, yellow, teal), dynamic comic lettering. Main character: A stylish young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="wavy mint-green"} hair, wearing oversized black sunglasses and a {argument name="clothing" default="pink polka-dot strapless top"}. Confident expression, glossy lips, dramatic lighting. Secondary character: A cute chibi-style character in a full penguin costume (dark blue body, white belly, yellow beak hood), big sparkling eyes, small body, playful and mischievous vibe. Panel 1 (close-up, bold intro): Zoomed-in portrait of the woman, hair slightly blowing. Bright comic burst background. Text: “THE WIND IS NO MATCH FOR MY SHADES!” Speech bubble: “Bring it, breeze.” Panel 2 (beach chaos begins): Beach setting with strong wind—palm trees bending, hat, towel, and drink flying. Woman standing confidently. Penguin character appears at the side. Text box: “BEACH DAY!” Speech bubble: “Ha! Nice try, wind.” Small penguin text: “awk!” Panel 3 (wind intensifies): Stronger gusts—trash can tipping, seagull mid-air, debris flying. Woman still composed, hair dramatically flowing. Penguin laughing mischievously. Text box: “STRONGER!” Speech bubbles: “Is that all?” / penguin: “hee hee!” Panel 4 (final punchline): Reveal a big electric fan wearing sunglasses blasting air dramatically. Woman surprised. Penguin proudly next to fan. Text box: “ULTIMATE BOSS.” Speech bubbles: “Wait… no!” Big comic text: “YOU GOT BLOWN AWAY!” Caption at bottom: “RESPECT THE FAN.” ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

raycast.title: Comic / Storyboard - Dark Fantasy Combining Mecha Lineup
raycast.description:
A wide concept-art lineup of six gothic biomechanical robot forms, ideal for generating a sinister combining mecha design sheet or key visual. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A dramatic dark fantasy mecha lineup on a black smoky studio-like background, rendered as ultra-detailed concept art with a wide cinematic composition. Show exactly 6 sinister biomechanical figures standing side by side on a glossy reflective floor, all designed as parts or forms of a combining robot set. The overall design language is gothic, infernal, and baroque: blackened steel, tarnished silver armor, serrated edges, thorn-like protrusions, skeletal filigree, red glowing cores and eyes, with subtle white-metal highlights and traces of crimson energy. The mood is ominous, majestic, and apocalyptic. From left to right: first, a towering humanoid overlord mech, the largest figure in the lineup, with a crown-like halo ring behind the head, huge layered black feathered or blade-like wings draping downward, ornate chest armor with a bright central core, multiple red glowing orbs embedded asymmetrically, and a long staff or spear held diagonally. Second, a tall slender angelic-demonic humanoid mech with an elongated body, spiked antler-like crest, narrow waist, blade-like hanging armor panels, and red glowing shoulder nodes, posed upright and regal. Third, a beast unit on four legs, low and aggressive like a demonic wolf or draconic hound, covered in curved blade armor and long swept-back horns, with glowing red eyes and an arched tail or spine silhouette. Fourth, a heavy quadruped siege unit, bulkier and more armored, with a forward head assembly and two large circular shield-like wheel structures mounted on its sides, full of radial spikes and a glowing red core at the center of one wheel. Fifth, a centaur-like or upright beast warrior mech with long legs, layered armor, horned head, and a sharp avian-draconic profile, slimmer than the heavy unit but still imposing, with red lights in the chest and head. Sixth, a symmetrical winged emblem-like unit resembling a mechanical phoenix crest rather than a humanoid body, with two broad metallic wings spread outward around a central halo ring and a tapered hanging tail piece set with 3 visible red gem-like cores. Keep the palette nearly monochrome except for the glowing reds. Emphasize razor-sharp silhouettes, intricate engravings, layered armor plates, cables and skeletal mechanical details, smoke drifting behind the figures, and faint reflections beneath their feet. The image should feel like a premium concept sheet for a {argument name="theme" default="dark combining robot"} in the style of hyper-detailed dark fantasy sci-fi illustration. Use a panoramic aspect ratio, front-facing lineup presentation, and high contrast lighting that picks out metallic edges against the deep black background. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1
#### 📌 Details - **Author:** [Maki@Sunwood AI Labs.](https://x.com/hAru_mAki_ch) - **Source:** [Twitter Post](https://x.com/hAru_mAki_ch/status/2049087124490920427#reversed-0) - **Published:** April 28, 2026 - **Languages:** en **[👉 Try it now →](https://youmind.com/gpt-image-2-prompts?id=16909)** ---

raycast.title: Comic / Storyboard - Fox-Eared Streetwear Boy in Steampunk City
raycast.description:
This prompt generates a stylish anime character portrait with fantasy animal traits posed against a dense industrial fantasy cityscape, ideal for character art and dramatic social-media illustrations. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A highly detailed anime-style illustration of a fashionable fox-eared young man sitting casually on the edge of a floating industrial platform in a vast vertical steampunk city. He has messy layered {argument name="hair color" default="light blond"} hair with a small streak of deep magenta near one side, 2 large fox ears with pale inner fur, and a fluffy cream-colored fox tail curling behind him. His face is intentionally obscured by a flat square censor block centered over the face. He wears a glossy black bomber jacket embroidered with scattered floral patterns in 2 colors, red-pink and violet-blue, with ribbed cuffs and collar striped in dark red and black. Under it is a black graphic T-shirt with ornate gold lettering and emblem details, partially hidden by layered straps and necklaces. His outfit includes loose black cargo-style pants with zipper details, black socks with small gold lettering, and chunky black platform shoes with bright magenta laces. Add multiple silver rings, black suspenders or harness straps with metal buckles, and a long olive-gold hanging belt strap draped off the platform. Pose him in a relaxed seated posture with 1 knee raised and 1 leg extended diagonally downward, left arm resting over the raised knee and right hand planted beside him. The mood is cool, urban, and slightly rebellious. The background is an intricate labyrinth of towering pale teal and off-white mechanical structures, stacked platforms, scaffolding, hanging chains, exposed cables, suspended boxes, and several round clocks embedded in the architecture, creating a dense vertical futuristic-steampunk environment fading into atmospheric haze. Use soft daylight, muted pastel industrial colors, fine linework, delicate ink-and-watercolor rendering, crisp fabric highlights, and a polished contemporary anime illustration aesthetic. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

raycast.title: Comic / Storyboard - Iridescent Squirrel Girl Above Sapporo
raycast.description:
This prompt generates a polished anime fantasy cityscape of a sparkling squirrel-eared girl flying over Sapporo surrounded by glossy soap bubbles, ideal for vibrant AI art and character-centric key visuals. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A luminous anime fantasy illustration of an {argument name="animal mascot" default="Ezo flying squirrel girl"} soaring high above {argument name="city" default="Sapporo"} on a brilliant summer day, viewed from a dramatic aerial angle over a long tree-lined boulevard and park with fountains, crowds, flower beds, and the red Sapporo TV Tower rising in the distance. The character is a youthful, ethereal kemonomimi girl with 2 fluffy squirrel ears, 1 large fluffy tail, and long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="silver-blonde"} hair whipping in the wind, posed diagonally across the frame as if gliding or floating through the sky with both arms stretched wide. She wears an intricate, shimmering translucent outfit in {argument name="outfit color" default="iridescent pastel white"}: a jewel-studded fantasy dress with sheer cape-like fabric, delicate straps, frilled shorts, glossy thigh-high stockings, ornate bracelets, gemstone ornaments, and light lace-up shoes. Emphasize highly reflective soap-bubble aesthetics throughout: exactly 18 visible bubbles of varying size floating around her, each with rainbow iridescence, sparkling highlights, and glassy reflections, with additional tiny star-like glints scattered across the scene. The fabrics should look pearlescent and almost bubble-made, with intense prismatic light, glitter, and a polished high-detail gpt-image-2 anime finish. Bright saturated blue sky, fluffy white clouds, crisp sunlight, detailed urban skyline, lush green trees, and a magical airy sense of motion and freedom. Make it feel dazzling, expensive, ornate, whimsical, and celebratory, with the composition centered on the flying character crossing the cityscape in a burst of bubbles and light. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

raycast.title: Comic / Storyboard - Dark Fantasy Inner Monster Poster
raycast.description:
This prompt generates a dramatic gothic anime-style poster of a silver-haired woman and a blue-eyed eldritch monster, ideal for moody art campaigns, book-cover concepts, or social media design pieces. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A dark fantasy gothic poster in a vertical composition, painted in a highly detailed anime-inspired style with dramatic lighting and rich texture. At the center is a beautiful young woman with long straight {argument name="hair color" default="silver-white"} hair, pale skin, and an elegant, calm but dangerous presence. Her face is mostly obscured in shadow and mystery. She wears an ornate black-and-deep-blue crystalline dress with lace, feathered and jagged organic details, semi-transparent flowing sleeves, and glowing blue highlights across the bodice and collar, as if infused with magic. Her right hand is raised slightly with an open gesture, while her left hand rests lower near her waist. Surrounding and partly growing from her are luminous blue butterflies and shard-like petals, creating a sense of transformation and corruption. Behind her looms a gigantic monstrous entity made of darkness, ink, smoke, and cosmic texture, with exactly 7 glowing blue eyes visible and a huge fanged grin packed with sharp icy-blue teeth. The creature feels Lovecraftian, predatory, and intimate, curling around her like a guardian, curse, or inner demon. The palette is dominated by black, midnight navy, indigo, and electric blue, with sparkling highlights like stars or wet paint splatter. Add a decorative antique silver filigree border in all 4 corners and along the edges, making it feel like a sinister book cover or exhibition poster. Place large Japanese title text at the top: {argument name="title text" default="私の中のバケモノ"}. Add 8 blocks of vertical Japanese copy around the figure, 4 on the left and 4 on the right, in elegant white Mincho-style type. Left side text blocks, top to bottom: 「創造の源、すべてを壊し、すべてを生む。」, 「正しさよりも、心が動く瞬間を信じる。」, 「美しいものに飢えている。」, 「静けさの中で、世界をかき混ぜる。」. Right side text blocks, top to bottom: 「感情を深く、人の痛みも、希望も、まるごと抱きしめる。」, 「枠を壊し、誰も見たことのない景色を描きたい。」, 「怖い、危ない、それでも止められない。」, plus a short atmospheric handwritten-style accent near the mid-right edge. At the lower center, add a large Japanese question line: {argument name="bottom question" default="これは、力？それとも、呪い？"}. At the very bottom, add a smaller Japanese line: {argument name="tagline text" default="私の中のバケモノは、私だけの物語を待っている。"}. Make the whole image feel obsessive, beautiful, unsettling, and emotionally intense, like a high-end dark art poster about inner monsters and creative power. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1
#### 📌 Details - **Author:** [五島 雅｜Goshima Production](https://x.com/miyabigoshima) - **Source:** [Twitter Post](https://x.com/miyabigoshima/status/2048999501235663327#reversed-0) - **Published:** April 28, 2026 - **Languages:** en **[👉 Try it now →](https://youmind.com/gpt-image-2-prompts?id=16705)** ---

raycast.title: Product Marketing - Surreal Crocs Summer Ad Poster
raycast.description:
This prompt generates a polished vertical lifestyle ad featuring a woman relaxing beside a giant Crocs-style clog, ideal for playful fashion campaigns and mock brand posters. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Create a surreal lifestyle fashion advertisement poster for {argument name="brand name" default="crocs"}. Vertical composition, photorealistic, golden-hour outdoor lighting. A young woman sits relaxed on a grassy lakeside meadow filled with small white daisies, leaning against an enormous oversized foam clog in a pale sage green color. The giant shoe should dominate the scene like a playful sculpture, positioned behind her at a slight angle with the heel strap raised upright and visible round logo rivet on the side. Show realistic Crocs-style details: ventilation holes on top, textured molded foam surface, thick sole, front ports, and side perforations. The model wears matching light green clogs, white scrunched crew socks, a muted sage green cropped tank top, high-waisted cream patterned shorts, an open loose white shirt draped off her shoulders, and a simple necklace. She has dark hair in a messy bun and reclines with one knee bent, gazing upward in a carefree pose. Background: calm lake, distant green hills or low mountains, and a bright blue sky with large soft cumulus clouds. Use a clean editorial ad aesthetic with cheerful, airy summer vibes, shallow depth of field but enough clarity to keep both the model and giant clog sharp. Add centered white brand text at the top: large rounded lowercase logo reading {argument name="logo text" default="crocs"} with a small trademark symbol, and beneath it a white slogan line reading {argument name="tagline" default="Come as you are. Comfort follows."}. Emphasize harmony between the model's outfit and the shoe color palette, aspirational comfort, whimsical scale contrast, and polished commercial photography. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1
#### 📌 Details - **Author:** [UxUi Tega (Design & Ai)](https://x.com/Tegadesigns) - **Source:** [Twitter Post](https://x.com/Tegadesigns/status/2049400556578382190#reversed-1) - **Published:** April 29, 2026 - **Languages:** en **[👉 Try it now →](https://youmind.com/gpt-image-2-prompts?id=16867)** ---

raycast.title: Product Marketing - Holographic AI Visionary Trading Card
raycast.description:
A premium sci-fi collectible trading card portrait of Sam Altman styled like a holographic battle card, ideal for AI-themed character cards and novelty card art. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A highly detailed collectible trading card illustration in the style of a premium holographic monster card, vertical 2.5:3 layout with a thick metallic gold border and glossy foil finish. The card features {argument name="character name" default="Sam Altman"} as the central figure, shown from the chest up in a dark navy blazer over a muted charcoal t-shirt, with short curly dark brown hair, standing against a luminous futuristic cosmic-tech background. The face is intentionally obscured by a large soft-edged rectangular blur centered over the face. At the top left, a silver badge reads BASIC. Across the top center, the large title text reads {argument name="headline text" default="Sam Altman"}, with a smaller silver ribbon subtitle below reading {argument name="subtitle" default="AI Visionary"}. At the top right, display HP 130 and a small circular tech-energy icon. The background is dense with glowing blue, violet, and gold circuitry, stars, and data-like light trails. On the upper left behind the character, include a bright neon emblem resembling an AI knot logo floating above a vertical beam of light. In the upper right, include a white network diagram with connected nodes labeled MODELS, and slightly lower a circular interface ring labeled ALIGNMENT. Near the lower right of the portrait area, show the curved horizon of Earth with glowing interconnected lines across the planet. On the lower left of the portrait area, include a dark teal billboard-like panel with the text BUILDING SAFE & BENEFICIAL AGI and tiny silhouetted figures below it. Also on the lower left overlapping the portrait frame, place a black-and-gold badge with a brain-chip emblem and the word LEGEND. Beneath the portrait, add a silver info bar reading NO. 1985 Tech Entrepreneur HT: 5'9” WT: 165 lbs. The lower half of the card contains 3 gameplay text sections. First section: a red metallic capsule header labeled Ability, followed by the purple title Scale Intelligence and a small tech-energy icon on the right; below it, a paragraph of black rules text describing a strategic deck-search ability. Second section: an attack row with 3 small circular energy icons on the left, the bold attack name Model Leap, and damage 70+ aligned right; below it, a short explanatory sentence in black text. Third section: another attack row with 4 small circular energy icons on the left, the bold attack name AGI Catalyst, and damage 120 aligned right; below it, another explanatory sentence in black text. Under those, add an italic quote box with a beveled silver frame containing {argument name="quote" default="The cost of intelligence will eventually converge to near the cost of electricity." — Sam Altman}. At the very bottom, include a stats strip with 3 labeled components: weakness with a blue lightning icon and ×2, resistance with a gray shield icon and -30, and retreat with 2 black arrow-energy symbols. In the lower left footer, add tiny illustrator credit text and card numbering: Illus. Next Frontier Studios and 003/150. Overall look: polished premium trading card, holographic rainbow sheen, sharp typography, embossed metallic UI, sci-fi prestige aesthetic, deep blue and purple palette with gold highlights, high contrast, collectible card game design. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1
#### 📌 Details - **Author:** [Derya Unutmaz, MD](https://x.com/DeryaTR_) - **Source:** [Twitter Post](https://x.com/DeryaTR_/status/2049259794523935010#reversed-0) - **Published:** April 28, 2026 - **Languages:** en **[👉 Try it now →](https://youmind.com/gpt-image-2-prompts?id=16950)** ---

raycast.title: Product Marketing - AI Partnership Launch Poster Scene
raycast.description:
This prompt generates a polished promotional poster showing two AI mascots announcing a creative-tech collaboration in a lively studio press event, ideal for launch campaigns and social media marketing. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A warm, editorial-style announcement poster set inside a sunlit creative studio with a cozy startup office vibe. Center the composition on two cute mascots sitting side by side on a beige couch, surrounded by photographers, journalists, and content creators documenting the moment. Above them, place a large hand-painted poster on a light brick wall reading “Big news. Better together. {argument name="brand name" default="Skywork"} × {argument name="product name" default="GPT Image 2"}” in oversized brush lettering, with playful colorful accent strokes around the text. The left mascot is a glossy blue chibi character with a round body, big black oval eyes, a smiling face, white face panel, a paintbrush-shaped crest on its head, a painter’s palette motif on its cheek, and a white “S” on its belly, gesturing happily with one hand. The right mascot is a small white-and-teal robot with a rounded helmet-like head, black face screen, glowing cyan eyes and smile, teal circuitry details across the body, and a teal spiral emblem on the chest, also smiling and gesturing as if in conversation. Put a wooden coffee table in front of them with exactly 8 visible items: 1 small potted plant, 1 white mug reading “PIXELS IDEAS IMPACT,” 3 stacked design books, 1 open sketchbook with concept drawings, 1 pen, 1 smartphone lying flat, and 1 smartphone held in the foreground capturing the mascots. Surround the scene with exactly 7 visible human figures partially entering frame, some holding DSLR cameras, one holding a video camera with a flip-out screen, and 3 microphones with cube flags labeled “TECH NEWS,” “AI ZONE,” and another media mic. Add translucent cyan holographic interface panels floating beside the robot, suggesting AI-generated visuals and design tools. Decorate the walls and shelves with creative studio details: pinned art prints and posters reading “Create Inspire Elevate,” “CREATIVITY MEETS INTELLIGENCE,” “IMAGINE GENERATE ELEVATE,” and “FUTURE IS CREATIVE,” plus a paintbrush illustration, a circuit diagram print, books, plants, and a studio light in the upper right corner. Lighting is golden-hour sunlight streaming through large industrial windows on both sides, creating a cinematic, optimistic launch-event mood. Style: polished 3D illustration mixed with commercial lifestyle photography, highly detailed, friendly, brand-forward, vibrant but tasteful colors, soft depth of field, premium poster composition, square format. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1
