raycast.title: Product Marketing - Style Spectrum Fashion Poster
raycast.description:
A luxury vertical editorial poster showing seven styled personas of the same woman, ideal for fashion branding, personal style concepts, or social media campaign visuals. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A high-end fashion editorial poster in a vertical 9:16 format, set inside a serene futuristic circular gallery with smooth beige stone walls, a large round skylight in the ceiling, soft diffused warm lighting, and a sculptural circular platform at the center. The image shows 7 versions of the same young East Asian woman with long dark wavy hair, each styled as a different personality archetype, arranged around the circular platform in an elegant symmetrical composition. The central and largest figure sits on the edge of the platform facing forward, wearing a loose ivory-white button-front blouse and matching relaxed trousers, calm and introspective, becoming the visual anchor. Around her are 6 alternate style personas: 1 woman on the left in a soft cream dress with hair in a bun, gentle and approachable; 1 woman at the back center standing in a sleeveless black tailored outfit, cool and rational; 1 woman on the upper right seated in a light beige cardigan and pale skirt or trousers, casual and relaxed; 1 woman on the lower left in a sharp black blazer and dark outfit, urban minimalist; 1 woman on the lower right in a taupe oversized suit, mature and confident; 1 woman at the bottom front crouching in a cozy cream knit and loose light pants, everyday comfort style. All seven figures have the same identity but different styling, mood, and pose. Use a muted neutral palette of ivory, cream, taupe, beige, stone gray, and black, with soft atmospheric haze, cinematic depth, luxury magazine aesthetics, minimalism, and polished skin. Add elegant Chinese typography integrated into the composition: top headline {argument name="headline text" default="你不只有一种样子"} with smaller English subtitle {argument name="subtitle text" default="Explore your style spectrum"}. Place 6 Chinese style labels with short descriptive taglines near the surrounding personas: 温柔氛围, 清冷知性, 松弛韩系, 都市极简, 轻熟气场, 日常休闲. At the bottom add the Chinese call-to-action {argument name="bottom question" default="你最想成为哪一个？"} and smaller line {argument name="bottom caption" default="评论区告诉我"}. Premium poster design, fashion campaign feel, graceful composition, soft focus, refined and aspirational. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1
##### Image 2

raycast.title: Product Marketing - AI Model Router App Store Screenshot
raycast.description:
A premium mobile app marketing screenshot showing a branded AI model-routing interface with provider logos, promotional copy, and a cute mascot, ideal for App Store listings or startup launch visuals. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Create a polished App Store promotional screenshot in a warm beige and golden-orange brand palette, portrait orientation, with a premium friendly startup aesthetic. The layout is a single vertically composed marketing graphic with a soft cream background and an orange gradient floor at the bottom. On the left upper side, place a very large elegant black serif headline split across 3 lines reading {argument name="headline text" default="Powered by leading AI models"}. To the right of the headline, add a small white jagged starburst badge with a subtle drop shadow containing 2 lines of serif text: {argument name="badge text" default="Best models"}. Beneath the headline on the left, show a vertical list of exactly 4 AI providers with icon plus name, evenly spaced: Claude with an orange sunburst icon, Gemini with a multicolor four-point sparkle icon, OpenAI with a black knot logo, and Seedance with a purple-blue gradient S icon. Below that, add a left-aligned serif body copy block with 2 parts: first a black text list on 4 lines reading "Claude, Gemini, OpenAI, Seedance.", then a final brand-colored orange line reading {argument name="tagline text" default="Empowered by Merl."}. On the right half, place a large realistic modern smartphone angled slightly left, with a reflective silver frame, black screen border, dynamic-island style top cutout, visible side button, and soft shadow. The phone screen should show a clean cream-colored app UI for an AI model-routing app. At the very top of the phone display, include the status time 9:41 and standard signal, wifi, and battery icons. Inside the app, show a tiny greeting line "HEY BESTIE.", then a bold serif question title {argument name="screen title" default="What are we casting?"}, followed by a short sans-serif subtitle about routing the request to the best AI model for the job. Add a small rounded badge in the upper right of the app content reading "+ 8 credits". Below that, include a section label "The model stack" and a stack of exactly 4 rounded cards, each in a lightly tinted pastel background. Card 1: Claude, with orange sunburst icon, description "writing, reasoning, voice-matched outputs", and a small pill label "BEST FOR WRITING". Card 2: Gemini, with multicolor sparkle icon, description "image generation, research, visual tasks", and pill label "BEST FOR IMAGES". Card 3: OpenAI, with black knot icon, description "headshots, image generation, smart creation", and pill label "BEST FOR CREATION". Card 4: Seedance, with purple-blue gradient S icon, description "video generation, motion, AI UGC clips", and pill label "BEST FOR VIDEO". Under the cards, place a large rounded yellow-orange CTA button reading "Start Casting ✦", with a small line below saying "8 credits per session". At the bottom of the phone UI, create a black tab bar with exactly 4 navigation items: home icon, a selected center pill with a small mascot face and the label {argument name="app name" default="Merl"}, a clock/history icon, and a profile icon. In front of the lower left of the phone, place a cute 3D mascot character: a rounded cream-colored blob with tiny feet, dark brown dot eyes, rosy cheeks, and a smiling mouth, wearing a golden wizard hat and matching cape tied with a round clasp. The mascot should overlap the phone slightly and sit on the orange floor, casting a soft shadow. Overall style: luxury-friendly tech branding, crisp typography, subtle realism, soft shadows, clean app mockup, App Store screenshot quality, consistent visual branding, highly legible, high resolution. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1
#### 📌 Details - **Author:** [ashen](https://x.com/ashen_one) - **Source:** [Twitter Post](https://x.com/ashen_one/status/2049141379482488975#reversed-2) - **Published:** April 28, 2026 - **Languages:** en **[👉 Try it now →](https://youmind.com/gpt-image-2-prompts?id=16943)** ---

raycast.title: Product Marketing - AI Headshot App Store Promo Poster
raycast.description:
A branded mobile app marketing visual showing an AI headshot app interface, before-and-after results, and a cute mascot, suitable for App Store screenshots or launch campaigns. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Create a polished App Store promotional poster for an AI headshot app called {argument name="app name" default="Shine"}, in a warm minimalist brand style. Use a vertical smartphone screenshot ad layout on a soft beige background with a curved golden-yellow shape rising from the bottom edge. Place a large elegant black serif headline in the upper left, split across 3 lines, reading {argument name="headline text" default="Create pro headshots with Shine"}. Add a white jagged starburst badge to the left-center with black serif text reading {argument name="badge text" default="Before + After"}. On the right side, show a large angled modern smartphone mockup, slightly tilted left, with thin metallic edges and a realistic screen. The phone display should show the app interface for AI-generated professional headshots. At the top of the screen, include a small wordmark reading SHINE, a large serif subheadline saying "Your best self, professionally.", supporting body text saying "Upload a few photos and we’ll create studio-quality headshots.", a small rounded pill in the upper right that says "⚡ 8 credits", and an iPhone-style status bar showing 9:41. In the middle of the phone screen, show a before-and-after comparison card with 2 portrait panels side by side, each labeled exactly once: 1 left label "Before" and 1 right label "After". The left portrait is a casual man in a dark T-shirt against a plain indoor background; the right portrait is the same man transformed into a professional headshot wearing a dark blazer over a light shirt with a warm studio bokeh background. Put a circular swap arrow button centered between the 2 panels. Below that, include a "HOW IT WORKS" section with exactly 3 steps arranged vertically: 1) "1. Upload" with the text "Add 8–12 clear photos of yourself.", 2) "2. We create" with the text "Our AI generates a variety of pro headshots.", 3) "3. Download" with the text "Choose your favorites and download high-res images." Give each step a rounded square pastel icon tile in peach or pink tones. Near the bottom of the phone screen, add a large rounded yellow CTA button reading {argument name="button text" default="Start Shine ✦"}, and beneath it small text saying "8 credits per session". In the lower left foreground, place a cute stylized white mascot character with a rounded body, tiny arms, blush cheeks, dot eyes, and a smiling mouth, wearing a golden-yellow cowboy hat and matching neckerchief; the oversized hat should extend toward the center and overlap the base area in front of the phone. Use soft 3D illustration for the mascot, premium UI design for the phone screen, consistent beige-and-gold branding, subtle shadows, clean spacing, and a refined startup-marketing aesthetic. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

raycast.title: E-commerce Main Image - Reference-to-Boho Fashion Ad Remake
raycast.description:
This prompt recreates a lifestyle ecommerce fashion poster by applying the layout and visual style of one reference image to a different clothing product image with fresh marketing copy. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Using REFERENCE_0 as the layout, scene, and ad-style template, and REFERENCE_1 as the product source, recreate the same 2-panel fashion marketing collage but replace the original dress with the blouse from REFERENCE_1. Keep the beach-and-poolside lifestyle composition from REFERENCE_0: 1 large upper-left close crop, 1 full-body standing shot in the upper-right beach scene, 1 seated poolside shot in the lower-left, and 3 circular fabric/detail callouts stacked vertically on the right. Preserve the overall premium boho summer campaign look, soft natural sunlight, sandy beach, parasol, deck chair, basket accessories, and resort mood. Restyle the product into realistic lifestyle wear: the same red embroidered V-neck blouse from REFERENCE_1 paired with short denim bottoms in the full-body and seated views, while keeping the woman and styling visually consistent across all panels. Replace all headline and feature copy from the reference with new English fashion-ad text, not copied wording: use a large title {argument name="headline text" default="Holiday"} with a smaller script brand word above it, a short 3-line descriptive subtitle, and 3 feature blurbs matching the circular callouts. The 3 feature headings should emphasize neckline, sleeve length, and embroidery details. Keep the polished ecommerce poster design, rounded white card edges, elegant typography hierarchy, and a handwritten pink tagline at the lower right {argument name="tagline" default="Boho Chic Style"}. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

raycast.title: E-commerce Main Image - Luxury Skincare Editorial Grid
raycast.description:
A 12-panel cinematic beauty collage for premium skincare branding, ideal for cosmetic ads, campaign moodboards, and luxury product marketing. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Create a luxury skincare campaign collage in a 4 by 3 editorial grid with exactly 12 tiles, using a warm ivory, cream, champagne, and soft beige palette. The overall mood is ultra-refined, minimal, sensual, and high-end, with milky diffused lighting, soft cinematic shadows, glossy hydrated skin, and a premium beauty magazine aesthetic. Tile 1: a frosted glass skincare pump bottle standing on a clear shelf, matte cream body, metallic gold pump and collar, elegant serif branding reading {argument name="brand name" default="BLOOMGLOW"}, product name reading {argument name="product name" default="RADIANCE MOISTURIZING EMULSION"}, photographed against a creamy beige wall with diagonal sunlight. Tile 2: a macro swipe of thick white lotion on a smooth cream surface, sculptural texture, soft highlights. Tile 3: a close crop of a woman's head and neck from behind, dark hair in a clean low bun, luminous skin, ear visible, minimal composition. Tile 4: sheer cream curtains lit by sunlight with the shadow silhouette of leaves or flowers cast across them. Tile 5: close-up of a woman's bare shoulder and upper back, dewy glowing skin, one hand touching the shoulder, a thin streak of lotion trailing down the back, intimate skincare editorial framing. Tile 6: a glossy translucent droplet of emulsion resting on a creamy matte surface, macro product texture study. Tile 7: a close crop of the lower face, jawline, neck, and collarbone of the same woman, fingers gently touching the neck, fresh hydrated glow, soft shadow. Tile 8: another macro smear of white cream, smoother and broader than tile 2, with reflective wet highlights. Tile 9: sunlit rippling water in pale champagne tones, abstract liquid texture with sparkling reflections. Tile 10: the same skincare bottle lying diagonally on softly wrinkled satin or silk fabric, gentle sunlight, subtle shadow, branding visible. Tile 11: close-up of hands applying a white oval dollop of lotion onto the back of one hand with the fingertips of the other hand, elegant manicured natural nails. Tile 12: glossy neckline and shoulders of the woman, collarbones highlighted, luminous moisturized skin, dark hair partially visible at the top edge. Keep the composition clean and balanced with thin white dividers between all 12 panels. Style keywords: minimalist luxury, creamy soft light, premium cosmetic advertisement, tactile textures, hydration, skin radiance, cinematic beauty editorial, understated opulence, breathable moisture glow. No clutter, no bright colors, no props beyond bottle, fabric, water, curtains, and skincare textures. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

A sophisticated prompt for creating high-end product advertising photos featuring a model and detailed product packaging with modern typography and studio lighting. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A polished, high-end product photography scene showcases a confident young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="smooth dark hair"}, dressed in a soft pink textured top, standing against a minimalist grey studio backdrop. In the foreground, a sleek {argument name="product name" default="Ellie Beauty spray bottle"} takes center focus, sharply detailed with a reflective metallic label that shifts between green and gold tones. The composition is brought to life with dynamic lime-green motion streaks and floating rounded tags that call out key benefits such as “high-shine finish” and “heat defense up to 450°F” in bold, modern sans-serif typography. Soft, diffused studio lighting enhances the model’s natural features while producing crisp reflections along the bottle’s surface. In the upper corner, a striking lime-green headline poses the question, “{argument name="headline" default="What does it do?"}”, tying the layout together with a fresh, contemporary advertising feel and a shallow depth of field that keeps both the product and the model’s expression clear and compelling. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

raycast.title: E-commerce Main Image - Luxury Vitamin C Serum Product Shot
raycast.description:
This prompt generates a premium photorealistic skincare product image for e-commerce, beauty ads, and luxury wellness branding. #### 📝 Prompt ``` A high-end commercial skincare product photo on a light marble bathroom counter, centered on a clear glass dropper bottle filled with warm amber-orange serum. The bottle is covered in realistic condensation droplets and has a white rubber pipette top with a shiny metallic gold collar. The front label is elegant and minimal, reading {argument name="brand name" default="HydraGlow"} with smaller lines {argument name="product name" default="Vitamin C Serum - 30ml"} and {argument name="benefit line" default="Brightening & Anti-Aging Formula"}, plus a simple gold botanical lotus-style logo above the brand name. Soft natural morning light streams in from the side, creating gentle highlights, subtle shadows, and a clean luxury spa atmosphere. In the blurred background, include 1 ribbed clear glass vase with green leafy branches on the left, 1 stack of 3 folded white towels on the right, 1 shallow white dish with faint gold veining on the left foreground, and 1 small white bowl with a thin gold rim on the right foreground. Use shallow depth of field, crisp focus on the bottle, neutral cream and white palette, premium e-commerce advertising aesthetic, photorealistic textures, and refined wellness branding style. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1

raycast.title: E-commerce Main Image - Protein Powder Splash Hero Shot
raycast.description:
This prompt generates a dramatic premium supplement product advertisement with a floating whey tub, chocolate splash, and flying cookies for ecommerce or fitness brand web assets. #### 📝 Prompt ``` Create a hyper-realistic commercial product splash shot of a large white plastic whey protein tub labeled {argument name="brand name" default="PUREZZA"} and {argument name="product name" default="WHEYPRO"}, floating slightly above a glass filled with thick chocolate protein shake. The tub is centered, angled slightly to the right, with a clean glossy surface and a bold blue, white, and black label design. The label should prominently read “100% WPC PROTEIN MILK” and include small nutrition callouts such as “82G PROTEIN,” “2G SUGAR/SERVING,” “119% RDI OF VC,” “100% CHOLINE,” a circular “GMP” badge, a black strip reading “WHEY MILK PROTEIN CONCENTRATE,” another strip reading “LOW SUGAR / LOW FAT / RICH NATURAL,” and a flavor tag reading {argument name="flavor text" default="BLACK COOKIES FLAVOUR"}. Surround the tub with an explosive upward and outward splash of glossy chocolate liquid, with dramatic arcs, droplets, and suspended motion frozen in midair. Include exactly 5 whole chocolate sandwich cookies flying around the product and multiple broken cookie chunks and crumbs scattered throughout the scene, with one partially visible cookie near the lower right and another near the upper left. The glass at the bottom should be only partially visible, transparent, and overflowing from the impact of the splash. Use a high-contrast studio background with a dark deep blue gradient on the left fading to bright white on the right, cinematic rim lighting, crisp reflections, ultra-sharp focus on the tub, and detailed texture in the liquid and cookie crumbs. The overall look should be premium sports nutrition advertising, dynamic, energetic, and suitable for a hero image on a modern ecommerce fitness website. ``` #### 🖼️ Generated Images ##### Image 1
#### 📌 Details - **Author:** [🏛️Aleksandros🏛️](https://x.com/CaudilloGalaico) - **Source:** [Twitter Post](https://x.com/CaudilloGalaico/status/2048741931962819045#reversed-0) - **Published:** April 27, 2026 - **Languages:** en **[👉 Try it now →](https://youmind.com/gpt-image-2-prompts?id=16728)** ---
